title: Contentful Space Audit
prompt: Audit the Contentful space for: 1) Content types with no entries, 2) Entries stuck in draft for 30+ days, 3) Content types missing required fields, 4) Orphaned assets not referenced by any entry, 5) Entries with broken references. Provide counts and specific IDs for each category, with recommended actions.

title: Content Type Migration Script
prompt: Generate a Contentful migration script (using contentful-migration) that: 1) Creates a new content type called [NAME] with fields [FIELDS], 2) Sets up proper validations (required, unique, regex patterns), 3) Configures the editor interface (widgets, help text), 4) Includes rollback steps. Use the Contentful Migration SDK syntax.

title: Stale Content Cleanup Plan
prompt: Review the stale drafts list and create a cleanup plan: 1) Categorize each stale entry as archive, update, or delete, 2) For entries to update, suggest what needs refreshing, 3) For entries to archive, confirm no live references, 4) Provide a week-by-week execution timeline. Prioritize entries stale for 60+ days.

title: Weekly Publish Velocity Report
prompt: Generate a weekly content publishing report covering: 1) Total entries published this week vs last week (trend), 2) Top content types by publish volume, 3) Average time from draft to publish, 4) Team member activity breakdown, 5) Content types with zero publishes. Format as a Slack-ready summary with emoji indicators for trends.

title: Content Model Architecture Review
prompt: Review the Contentful content model for: 1) Overly complex content types (10+ fields), 2) Missing reference relationships between types, 3) Fields that should be content references instead of plain text, 4) Content types that could be consolidated, 5) Missing localization setup. Provide a refactoring roadmap with effort estimates.
